creator: pen@lysator.liu.se
text:
I also have a couple of FreeBSD 13.2-RELEASE-p9 running servers with UEFI boot and Dual Console (video & serial) that refuse to reboot.

Unless I have an IPMI Serial Console session active/connected. (HP DL380G9 and Dell R730xd). A bit annoying...

It used to work, but I'm not sure if that was when using BIOS-boot, or just using an older FreeBSD release (worked at FreeBSD 11.4 time, but I'm unsure about FreeBSD 12...

It hangs at this point:

staging 0x60000000 (not copying) tramp 0x770fe000 PT4 0x770f5000
Start @ 0xffffffff8038b000 ...
EFI framebuffer information:
addr, size     0x91000000, 0x300000
dimensions     1024 x 768
stride         1024
masks          0x00ff0000, 0x0000ff00, 0x000000ff, 0xff000000
